summary:
The process depicted in the color plate corresponds to "Bleeding on Probing," which is a hallmark sign of periodontal disease due to its direct correlation with inflammation and tissue health. It offers immediate insights into the efficacy of treatments and aids in clinical decision-making and patient engagement throughout the therapeutic journey.
